hey folks! first time playing traphase mode. any guide i can look at?
Traphase is divided into 2 game mode
Which one you want a guide?
Or do you want a general guide? But it won't be specific enough

Traphase is a online PVP turn based 1 vs 1 gamemode where dupes doesn't matter on your PVP units stats, each units have their own stats and if the opponent use the same unit then they will have the same stats, for example Leigh have 70 HP, so the enemy Leigh will also have 70 HP and her exalt deal 18 dmg x 3, and so does your Leigh
- For all pick : you need to own the posses + wheels + units in order to use them
- For draft pick : you don't need to own them but it's RNG and you have to manually select them based on a sample of selections shown to you, it's selected per turns with your opponent
thanks for the write-up! i just tried draft picks and got bodied... i'm not too sure what characters/team comps and WoDs are good yet

Traphase gimmicks in generals :

- You start the match at 3 arithmetica max, each turns increase it by 1, it can also be increased through Posse effects or skills from units
- Each turns let you draw 6 cards and max hand cards is 10, so your optimal play should be to always try having a lower hand cards so you can draw more, stuff like 4 cards or lower in your hand is what you generally want but it can change depending on the utility of the cards so you can stash them too.
Both of hand size + draw cards per turns can be increased through wheels effects
For all pick it mainly depends on what you have
So they can synergies together
For draft pick since it's RNG then you can't really choose what you want to play but at elast everyone can play it without any restrictions towards owning = using it

For draft pick :
- Check relic
- Check units
- Check WoD
- See if there is some combo between units + WoD or units + units
- Sometimes the combo can get bricked by the relic
- Posse are situational, but some are extremely good to have stuff like stagnation 3 pierce or void
- Aim for counterpick, If the enemy take strike based unit then you take para posse stuff like that
- Based on the relic you change your playstyle, for example you got the relic that reshuffle your hand every turns, you discards all of your high cost wheel if you have more than 2 or 3 in starting hand
alright! i'll try again based on the tips that you've given. thank you so much! trying to build a strike team atm just to get the hang of things

I forgot to mention too, in general gimmicks :
- There is something called mulligan, when you start the battle against your opponent, you have a phase to choose what cards you want to be removed and changed from your first hand.

That phase compose of 5 selectable cards to be discarded, you can choose none too, discarded cards through that method will force them into last draw of your deck before reshuffle
For now since you just started i would recommend you to just read the kits of the units + wheel + posse you own and to test it yourself
You won't lose anything at low elo
each character can only equip 1 WoD during gameplay?
Yes, you can only equip 1 WoD per units, you can also equip other WoD too if you want but it will change the effects you will have from the wheel
For example there is a SR wheel that let you apply stagnation on strike
If you equip another WoD, it will also change it into the new WoD effects and you will lose the ability to stagnation people
By the way, there are some exceptions to that principle but it's niche uses

When a wheel have the effects +3 amplifications ( each stack of amplifications gives 10% DMG, shield, heal bonus ) + another other effects, if you change the wheel with something else, you can still retain the amplifications stacks
It doesn't works for temporary tho ( only within that turn or depending on the description of the wheel )

whats a good poison team for pvp?
You can go with doll + 24 + anyone + nymph
Nymph being in front
huh nymph in front? is she sacrifical?
You use the SSR wheel that let you shuffle the cards of your dead allies into the deck
Basically yeah
You need the posse that gives you enhance + 3 charge
And the SR wheel that poison with strike
You use both of them on 24
She will strike AoE and deal something like 20+ poison AoE
When nymph dies she shuffle her poison cards into your highest hp
You use the tank to stall dmg
And doll to revive nymph and make her exalt so she can x2 the poison
When i said anyone i meant any tanks
Well... Generally speaking
Poison team is just shit
In all pick
In draft it's pretty broken tho
The reason being all pick have snipe comp or stuff like tinct that can cleanse any debuffs
Meanwhile draft is more RNG
So the odds of getting tinct / cassiah + nymph is low
And if it does then you can just first pick to counterpick in case they pick nymph
There is also the usual strat of making horla + nymph combo
But it's harder because horla need to exalt
